title: OPERATION RAMP IT UP - 211info
text: OPERATION RAMP IT UP OPERATION RAMP IT UP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides and helps install wheelchair ramps. Also accepts donations of used aluminum wheelchair ramps. Financial donations are accepted to fund future projects and can be given in memory or honor of someone. 5299 Aspen Valley Drive Liberty Township, OH 45011 Eligibility: Military veterans or spouses of veterans who are confined to a wheelchair due to disability and have exhausted all other resources Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs * Veterans Home Barrier Evaluation/Removal Services Home Barrier Evaluation/Removal Services * Veterans Military Donations/Relief Programs Military Donations/Relief Programs * Veterans If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
